summary: Multi-Metric Simulation Comparison Engine (Step 1 - backend) testing complete. All 25 backend tests PASSED. Endpoint POST /api/operator/simulate/compare/multi-metric is fully functional and correctly evaluates two combined_anomaly configs (A vs B) against live production telemetry, computing deltas with no DB writes.

backend.test_response_has_required_top_level_key: PASS - All keys present: window_minutes, devices_evaluated, summary, delta, device_changes
backend.test_summary_structure: PASS - summary contains config_a/config_b with anomalies, instability_incidents, tier_counts (L1/L2/L3)
backend.test_delta_structure: PASS - delta contains anomalies_diff, instability_diff, tier_shift
backend.test_device_changes_structure: PASS - device_changes contains newly_flagged, no_longer_flagged, tier_upgraded, tier_downgraded
backend.test_identical_configs_produce_zero_delt: PASS - Same configs A=B produce all zeros
backend.test_lower_threshold_in_config_b_flags_m: PASS - Lower threshold catches more, newly_flagged populated
backend.test_higher_threshold_in_config_b_remove: PASS - Higher threshold removes devices, no_longer_flagged works
backend.test_same_configs_produce_same_results: PASS - Deterministic: identical requests produce identical results
backend.test_different_weights_affect_scores: PASS - Different weight distributions change results
backend.test_correlation_bonus_effect: PASS - Higher correlation bonus flags more devices
backend.test_no_new_anomalies_created: PASS - Read-only: no new anomalies created after comparison
backend.test_no_new_incidents_created: PASS - Read-only: no new incidents created after comparison

verified_scenarios.seeded_data_validation: Verified with seeded anomaly data: WBAND-E2E-001 (bat=70, sig=65, combined ~78.5), Mob-01 (bat=80, sig=75, combined ~88.5), TEST-WBAND-827d5e95 (bat=50, sig=40, combined ~57). With threshold 60: 2 flagged; threshold 55: 3 flagged (newly_flagged: TEST-WBAND-827d5e95).
verified_scenarios.tier_shift_verification: Verified tier shift: WBAND-E2E-001 (score 78.5) correctly upgraded L2→L3 when tier ranges changed from 70-85→L2 to 60-70→L2
verified_scenarios.simulated_anomalies_excluded: Confirmed: endpoint query uses 'AND da.is_simulated = false' to exclude simulated data
verified_scenarios.persistence_data_used: Confirmed: persistence_data pulled from multi_metric anomalies for escalation simulation

critical_code_review_comments: Endpoint correctly implements read-only evaluation with no DB writes
CombinedAnomalyConfig Pydantic model validates: weight_battery (0-1), weight_signal (0-1), trigger_threshold (0-100), correlation_bonus (0-50), persistence_minutes (>=1), escalation_tiers (dict)
CompareMultiMetricRequest validates window_minutes (5-1440) and fleet_scope pattern
_evaluate_config_in_memory() correctly computes weighted score + correlation bonus + tier mapping
_map_score_to_tier() from baseline_scheduler.py correctly handles tier range parsing and boundary conditions
Query correctly filters is_simulated=false to use only production anomalies
Delta calculation: anomalies_diff = B - A, tier_shift computed per tier level
Device changes correctly categorized: newly_flagged, no_longer_flagged, tier_upgraded, tier_downgraded
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded anomaly data: WBAND-E2E-001, Mob-01, TEST-WBAND-827d5e95 with battery_slope and signal_strength anomalies.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Metric Simulation Comparison Engine (backend) fully tested. Endpoint: POST /api/operator/simulate/compare/multi-metric. Accepts config_a and config_b with CombinedAnomalyConfig (weight_battery, weight_signal, trigger_threshold, correlation_bonus, persistence_minutes, escalation_tiers). Returns: window_minutes, devices_evaluated, summary (config_a/config_b anomalies/instability/tier_counts), delta (anomalies_diff/instability_diff/tier_shift), device_changes (newly_flagged/no_longer_flagged/tier_upgraded/tier_downgraded). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_multi_metric_comparison.py with 25 comprehensive tests covering auth, RBAC, response shape, delta calculation, threshold effects, tier shifts, determinism, validation, and read-only verification.
